narrative:
Swancreek West (precinct in Fulton County) has 1,284 registered voters, with 53.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.3 percentage points.
